title: How many dissenting votes at the next Fed meeting? (zero)

current.lean_note: low confidence — estimate too uncertain to fade the market
current.rationale_summary: April's anomalous 4-dissent meeting and dove Miran's likely cut-dissent against a hold make at least one dissent more probable than the market's 64% zero-dissent pricing, though a new-chair unity effect tempers this.
reference_classes: dissent rate in divided FOMC ~50% of meetings
